definitions: A young offspring of a various carnivores (canid, ursid, felid, pinniped), especially of a dog or a wolf, the young of a bear or similar mammal (lion, tiger, seal); a pup, wolf cub.

definitions: The time at which something happens.

definitions: (relative) At which, on which, during which: often omitted or replaced with that.
(interrogative) At what time? At which time? Upon which occasion or circumstance? Used to introduce direct or indirect questions about time.
At an earlier time and under different, usually less favorable, circumstances.
(fused relative) The time at, on or during which.
(informal, in definitions or explanations) A circumstance or situation in which.
examples: I recall when they were called the Greys.
When will they arrive?

definitions: Since; given the fact that; considering that.
Whereas; although; at the same time as; in spite of the fact that.
At what time; at which time.
At (or as soon as) that time that; at the (or any and every) time that; if.
During the time that; at the time of the action of the following clause or participle phrase.
examples: It was raining when I came yesterday.
Be careful when crossing the street.

definitions: (interrogative) What time; which time.
examples: Since when do I need your permission?

definitions: (literary, poetic) Used for introducing the result of a fact that has just been stated; thence

definitions: In, at or near what location.

wherever

definitions: (informal) In, at or to any place that one likes or chooses.
